common.siteDescription: We engineer intelligent systems that transform raw data into decisive action. Custom AI solutions for predictive analytics, workflow automation, and decision intelligence.

hero.description: We build production-grade AI systems that transform raw data into decisive action — predictive analytics, workflow automation, and decision intelligence platforms engineered for measurable impact.

servicesSection.label: What We Do
servicesSection.title: Intelligent Systems, Engineered to Perform
servicesSection.description: From predictive analytics to decision intelligence — we build AI that operates at production scale.

servicesPage.label: Our Services
servicesPage.title: AI Solutions Engineered for Impact
servicesPage.description: Six core capabilities, each designed to transform a specific operational challenge into a measurable competitive advantage.

predictive-analytics.title: Predictive Analytics Engines
predictive-analytics.shortDescription: Custom ML models that forecast trends, demand curves, and failure points across operational datasets.
predictive-analytics.longDescription: Turn historical patterns into actionable foresight. Our predictive engines ingest multi-dimensional time-series data, identify non-obvious correlations, and deliver probability-weighted forecasts that integrate directly into your decision workflows.

workflow-automation.title: Workflow Automation Systems
workflow-automation.shortDescription: End-to-end process automation pipelines that eliminate manual bottlenecks and deliver zero-touch operation.
workflow-automation.longDescription: From data ingestion to decision output, our automation systems orchestrate complex multi-step processes with built-in error handling, audit trails, and human-in-the-loop escalation when confidence thresholds are not met.

decision-intelligence.title: Decision Intelligence Platforms
decision-intelligence.shortDescription: Structured frameworks that synthesize multi-source data into ranked decisions with confidence scores.
decision-intelligence.longDescription: Our decision platforms aggregate signals from disparate data sources, apply weighted scoring models, run Monte Carlo simulations, and present ranked options with transparent reasoning chains — so stakeholders can act with conviction, not guesswork.

nlp-pipelines.title: Natural Language Processing
nlp-pipelines.shortDescription: Custom NLP pipelines for document analysis, sentiment extraction, and automated report generation.
nlp-pipelines.longDescription: We build production-grade NLP systems that parse, classify, and extract structured intelligence from unstructured text at scale — from regulatory documents and contracts to customer feedback and research papers.

computer-vision.title: Computer Vision & Inspection
computer-vision.shortDescription: Automated visual inspection systems, defect detection, and image classification on edge or cloud.
computer-vision.longDescription: Our vision systems achieve sub-pixel precision for quality inspection, leveraging convolutional and transformer architectures optimized for deployment on edge devices or GPU-accelerated cloud infrastructure.

ai-strategy.title: AI Strategy & Integration
ai-strategy.shortDescription: Technical advisory for AI adoption roadmaps, model selection, and enterprise system integration.
ai-strategy.longDescription: We help organizations navigate the AI landscape with clear-eyed technical assessments — from readiness audits and infrastructure planning to vendor evaluation, model selection, and production deployment strategies.

projectsSection.label: Case Studies
projectsSection.title: Results That Speak in Numbers
projectsSection.description: Real-world AI deployments with quantified impact across industries.

projectsPage.label: Case Studies
projectsPage.title: Deployed Intelligence, Measured Impact
projectsPage.description: Every project starts with a data challenge and ends with a production system delivering quantified results.

meridian-forecasting.title: Meridian Forecasting Suite
meridian-forecasting.challenge: Grid load prediction was 72 hours behind real-time demand shifts, causing $2.3M/year in balancing costs.
meridian-forecasting.solution: Deployed an LSTM ensemble model processing 14 data streams at 15-minute intervals, integrated with the existing SCADA infrastructure via streaming ingestion layer.
meridian-forecasting.result: Achieved 94.7% prediction accuracy at 15-minute intervals. Reduced energy balancing costs by 61% in the first operating quarter.

sentinel-quality.title: Sentinel Quality Gate
sentinel-quality.challenge: Manual visual inspection caught only 82% of surface micro-defects on turbine blade coatings, with 340 false positives per shift.
sentinel-quality.solution: Deployed a convolutional neural network trained on 45,000 annotated blade images, with edge inference on NVIDIA Jetson modules integrated into the production line.
sentinel-quality.result: 99.2% defect detection rate with 89% reduction in false positives. Inspection throughput increased 4x.

lexicon-intelligence.title: Lexicon Intelligence Hub
lexicon-intelligence.challenge: Regulatory analysts spent 400+ hours monthly reviewing 12,000+ documents for compliance relevance classification.
lexicon-intelligence.solution: Built a transformer-based NLP pipeline with fine-tuned classification models, active learning feedback loops, and a priority-ranked review dashboard.
lexicon-intelligence.result: Automated triage reduced manual review by 78%, flagging critical items in under 90 seconds with 96.3% classification accuracy.

atlas-decision.title: Atlas Decision Matrix
atlas-decision.challenge: Multi-vendor procurement decisions relied on spreadsheets with 15+ variable trade-offs, averaging 3 weeks per sourcing cycle.
atlas-decision.solution: Engineered a decision intelligence platform with weighted multi-criteria scoring, Monte Carlo simulation for risk assessment, and real-time constraint optimization.
atlas-decision.result: Sourcing cycle time reduced from 3 weeks to 4 days. Decision confidence scores improved procurement outcomes by 34%.

about.missionTitle: Decision Infrastructure for the AI Era
about.mission: We engineer intelligent systems that transform raw data into decisive action. At Mark Systems, we don't just build AI — we architect the decision infrastructure that gives organizations an unfair advantage.
about.teamDescription: Deep expertise across machine learning, systems engineering, and strategic advisory.
about.valuesDescription: Four non-negotiable principles that define every engagement.

marcus-chen.bio: Former principal engineer at DeepMind. 15 years building production ML systems across energy, defense, and finance. Founded Mark Systems to bridge the gap between research breakthroughs and operational reality.

elena-vasquez.bio: PhD in Statistical Learning from MIT. Led the machine learning platform team at Stripe before joining Mark Systems. Specializes in building scalable inference pipelines that operate under strict latency constraints.

james-okafor.bio: Previously at Tesla Autopilot and Waymo. Expert in computer vision, edge deployment, and model optimization. Leads our engineering team in delivering production-grade AI systems.

sarah-kim.bio: Former McKinsey engagement manager specializing in AI transformation. Translates complex technical capabilities into measurable business outcomes for our clients.

0.title: Precision Over Hype
0.description: We ship measurable results, not demos. Every system we build is benchmarked against clearly defined KPIs before deployment.

1.title: Systems Thinking
1.description: Every component is designed for the whole. We engineer solutions that integrate cleanly into existing infrastructure, not isolated prototypes.

2.title: Transparent Intelligence
2.description: No black boxes. Our AI systems provide explainable outputs with confidence scores, audit trails, and clear reasoning chains.

3.title: Relentless Iteration
3.description: Production models improve continuously. We build monitoring, feedback loops, and retraining pipelines into every deployment from day one.
